description: Superpowers Flow Enforcer - Hooks to prevent skipping workflow phases

hooks.prompt: Read $USER_PROMPT and state file at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If user asks to skip brainstorming/tdd/review/finishing and exceptions.user_confirmed is not true, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "检测到跳过流程请求。请先明确确认：确认跳过 <phase>，并给出原因。"}. Otherwise return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.file_path and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Enforce workflow gates in this order: (1) If file_path is exactly .claude/flow_state.json, return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny"},"systemMessage":"禁止直接手改 flow_state.json，请通过 hooks 自动推进状态。"}. (2) If path matches canonical workflow-entry artifacts docs/superpowers/specs/*.md or docs/superpowers/plans/*.md and workflow.active is not true, return allow. (3) If workflow.active is not true, return allow. (4) If path matches docs/superpowers/plans/*.md and not (exceptions.skip_planning and exceptions.user_confirmed), deny unless brainstorming.spec_reviewed is true and brainstorming.user_approved_spec is true; only skip_planning may bypass this gate. If path matches docs/config/type/generated exceptions (*.md, docs/*, *.json, *.yaml, *.yml, *.config.*, .env*, *.d.ts, types/*.ts, *.types.ts, dist/*, build/*, docs/superpowers/specs/*), return allow. (5) For any code/test write outside above exceptions: if brainstorming.spec_written is not true and not (exceptions.skip_brainstorming and exceptions.user_confirmed), deny with message requiring brainstorming/SPEC first. (6) If exceptions.skip_tdd and exceptions.user_confirmed are true, return allow. (7) If worktree.created is false or worktree.baseline_verified is false, return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny"},"systemMessage":"TDD 之前必须先用 record-worktree-state.sh 记录 worktree.created 和 worktree.baseline_verified。"}. (8) If path is test-like (contains test/tests/spec/__tests__ or name has .test. .spec. _test. _spec.), return allow. (9) If tdd.pending_failure_record is true, return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny"},"systemMessage":"检测到待记录的失败测试目标。先运行 record-tdd-state.sh fail <target>，再继续修改生产代码。"}. (10) Otherwise treat as production file: infer candidate tests (same basename with .test/.spec). If no candidate appears in tdd.tests_verified_fail, return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny"},"systemMessage":"NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST. 先写测试并运行到失败。"}. Else return allow.

Read state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If workflow.active is not true, return {"continue": true}. If current_phase is brainstorming and brainstorming.question_asked is true, and brainstorming.findings_updated_after_question is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Brainstorming 阶段每次提问后必须更新 findings.md。"}. Otherwise return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.command. If command directly reads/writes .claude/flow_state.json and does NOT call ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/update-state.sh, return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny"},"systemMessage":"禁止直接操作 flow_state.json，请通过 update-state.sh。"}. Else return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"allow"}}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.file_path and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If file path matches docs/superpowers/specs/*.md and brainstorming.spec_self_reviewed is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "SPEC 已写入，必须先完成 Self-Review 并让用户批准后再进入 planning。"}. Else return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.file_path and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If file path matches docs/superpowers/plans/*.md and worktree.created is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Plan 已写完，先执行 using-git-worktrees 创建隔离工作区并跑 baseline tests。"}. Else return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT.command and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If command contains 'git worktree add' and worktree.baseline_verified is false, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Worktree 已创建，必须先完成 setup 和 baseline verification。"}. Else return {"continue": true}.

Read $TOOL_INPUT and state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If workflow.active is not true, return {"continue": true}. If task status is completed and review.tasks[task_id].spec_review_passed is not true or review.tasks[task_id].code_review_passed is not true, return {"continue": false, "systemMessage": "Task 标记完成前，必须完成两阶段 review。"}. Otherwise return {"continue": true}.

Read transcript at $TRANSCRIPT_PATH. Try to read state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If state file is readable and stop_hook_active is true, return {"decision": "approve"}. If state file is readable and interrupt.allowed is true, return {"decision": "approve", "systemMessage": "Interrupt recorded."}. If state file is missing or unreadable, ignore state-based checks here and only evaluate transcript-based completion evidence. Otherwise if completion keywords appear (done/complete/tests pass/fixed/working/完成/修复) but no fresh passing verification evidence in the latest context, return {"decision": "block", "reason": "Completion claimed without fresh verification evidence. Run verification now and show output."}. Else return {"decision": "approve"}.

Read state at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If state file is missing or unreadable, return {"decision": "approve"}. If workflow.active is not true, return {"decision": "approve"}. If stop_hook_active is true, return {"decision": "approve"}. If interrupt.allowed is true, return {"decision": "approve"}. If review.tasks is empty and not (exceptions.skip_review and exceptions.user_confirmed), return {"decision": "block", "reason": "还没有 review 记录，先执行 requesting-code-review 的两阶段评审。"}. If all tasks in review.tasks are fully passed and finishing.invoked is false and not (exceptions.skip_finishing and exceptions.user_confirmed), return {"decision": "block", "reason": "所有任务都已 review，通过后还需执行 finishing-a-development-branch。"}. Otherwise return {"decision": "approve"}.
